history.content:
<thought>
The goal G is located two rows ahead and two columns to the right of my current position. The cell directly in front of me is lava (L), so I cannot move forward. I need to turn to face east to approach the goal. Turning right will orient me towards the safe floor cell to my right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is located two rows ahead and two columns to the left. The cell directly in front of me is a floor cell, so I can safely move forward to approach the goal. I will move north first.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6,3) facing north. The goal G is at (5,1), which is to my left (west) and then north. The cell directly north

<thought>
The goal G is located at (5,1) which is north of the floor cell (6,1). My current position (6,3) is facing north. I need to move west to reach (6,1). The cell directly west (6,2) is a safe floor cell, so I can turn left to face west and then move forward. Turning left is the appropriate next step.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7,4) facing north. The goal G is at (5,5). The cells directly to the north (6,4) and further north (5,4) are floor cells. There are lava cells at (6,3) and (6,5), but the path north is clear. I can move forward to (6,4).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly north is floor (.), and the goal is visible at the cell northeast of that (north then east). The lava cells are to the left and right of the agent. Moving forward north is safe and brings us closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly to the east (right) of my current position. The cell in front (north) is a wall, so I cannot move forward. I need to turn right to face east, then I can move forward into the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is directly north (above) of my current position. The cell in front of me is G, which is safe and represents the goal. Moving forward will reach the goal and complete the task.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
